column2: Date: Enter the date you woke up today (the morning when you are filling out this form).
column3:
Morning Mood Score: How do you feel after waking up today?

Score Description
1 - Very Bad
Extremely tired, stressed, or unhappy. Low energy, difficulty starting the day.
2 - Bad
Somewhat tired or in a negative mood. Low motivation or mild stress.
3 - Neutral
Neither good nor bad. Normal energy level, emotionally stable.
4 - Good
Feeling positive and fairly energetic. Ready to start the day.
5 - Excellent
Very happy, refreshed, and full of energy after waking up.
column4: Bedtime: What time did you go to sleep?
column5: Wake Time: What time did you wake up?
